caveat_details.adv_trap_059: policy-gated; not counted; must not be treated as resolved
cross_route_053: Wikipedia/ZIM context evidence must not be overclaimed as dedicated book/PDF evidence
cached Tikal excerpts are supplementary only
LP locator is not counted as formal axis evidence
caveat_details.remaining_failed_or_deferred_cases: remaining 10 cases are excluded from the 50/60 official baseline
caveat_details.score_classification: 50/60 is a human-reviewed official baseline, not a raw candidate-only score.

nat_eco_046: Travel guide pages must not overrule geography/ecology sources.
Natural process / regional relation / ecology grounding remains source-scoped.
nat_eco_043: ScienceDirect metadata-only page is not counted unless body/extract exists.
Geomorphology / hydrology process grounding remains source-scoped.
obj_art_005: Architecture pages provide concept evidence, not listicle-only framing.
obj_art_011: Architectural order / column / capital / classical context remains source-backed.
Generic architecture-course filler is not overcounted.
hist_arch_025: Non-institutional pages are supplementary unless source-backed body is strong.
rel_space_036: UNESCO / Beijing Gov / Wikipedia provide source-scoped religious-spatial grounding.
TravelChinaGuide remains context/locator unless conceptual content is source-backed.

notes: This readiness artifact describes the explicit target layer only.
